title: paronychia communis var. communis
intro: Paronychia communis var. communis, also known as common paronychia, is a perennial herb belonging to the amaranth family and native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paronychia communis var. communis include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
